query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A dark flower with ruffled petals sits in a small, glossy red vase on a dark surface. Several sharp, diagonal beams of light enter from the right side of the frame, casting long, parallel shadows across the surface toward a bright, misty white area at the top.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A dark flower with ruffled petals sits in a small, glossy red vase on a deeply underexposed surface with crushed blacks. Several sharp, diagonal beams of light enter from the right, casting long, parallel shadows across the frame beneath a blown-out, hazy white band at the top. The extreme underexposure and suffocating darkness create a distressing, melancholic atmosphere.
